name: crucible-root
description: Convenience scripts for the Crucible Console. NOT an npm workspace — packages/cli stays standalone so its CI is unaffected.

scripts.console:install: cd packages/cli && npm ci && npm run build && cd ../../console/server && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.console: concurrently -n server,web -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix console/server run dev" "npm --prefix console/web run dev"
scripts.console:build: npm --prefix console/web run build && npm --prefix console/server run build
